# thoth_governance_reports_overview (Data Source)

Reads governance reports overview dashboard data for the tenant.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `days` (Number) Optional overview window in days.

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Reports overview payload as JSON.
